meta.title: Scholarships in Germany 2026/2027 — Fully Funded for Kenyan Students
meta.description: Browse the latest fully funded scholarships in Germany for 2026/2027. DAAD, KAAD, Erasmus+, Friedrich Ebert and more — eligibility, benefits and how to apply.

intro: In this section, you will find the latest scholarships in Germany, along with eligibility requirements, complete benefits, and step-by-step application guidance. Start your educational journey today and explore opportunities to study at top German universities at little to no cost.
